action.reasoning: Observation: The model trained for 40 epochs and achieved an MAE of 0.0710. The iteration took ~16 minutes. Analysis: The model is learning very well and we have plenty of time budget (1.53 hours left). To push the performance further, I will scale up the model capacity by increasing `hidden_channels` and `num_filters` from 256 to 384, and `num_gaussians` from 50 to 100. I will also increase the batch size to 256 to speed up training and train for 80 epochs. Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py with the new hyperparameters, run training, and submit an evaluation.
